title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Compass Group India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Compass Group India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Compass Group India Digital Technologies in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Compass Group India Digital Technologies:
Compass Group India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India Digital Technologies!
